chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 18 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.26 2. For hearing of main case 3. For order on CMA No.189/2020 10.10.2025 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 09.03.2020, following order was passed: “09.03.2020 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for applicant 1. To be complied with before the next date of hearing. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Learned counsel requests for time to reformulate the questions. Time is granted, however, subject to all just exceptions. Adjourned” Matter is taken up today and learned counsel remained unable to comply with earlier order. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
